name: Andrew Schulz
bio: Andrew Schulz is an American stand-up comedian, actor, and podcaster from New York City known for his crowd-work-heavy sets, self-released YouTube specials, and a confrontational style built around taboo subjects. He co-hosts the Flagrant and Brilliant Idiots podcasts and built a large audience by distributing his comedy directly online before releasing his first Netflix hour, Life, in 2025.

timeline.ev: Begins stand-up and online comedy work in New York
Launches the Flagrant podcast with Akaash Singh
Self-releases the special Infamous on YouTube
Releases first Netflix stand-up hour, Life

bits.t: She Asked Me to Get Tested. I Regret It.
The Real Reason Muslims & Jews Chop it Off
New York City Get These Jokes @ MSG
We Call Them the Jets for a Reason
